reviews.review_description:
Not sure what’s really in this Game? Firstly you get 500 gold coins, but the counter doesn’t move up, and there’s nothing too spend them on, yet?
Secondly, it’s easy, real easy, you just leave the Strings outside out the sockets, and move all the reset round it to complete it!
Think twice, wish I did.!!
Hi surprised how good this is. If you have problems undoing knots in shoelaces wait till you try this out !!!Frustratingly good fun !!! Cannot go wrong for the price 👍👍👍
